name: Rhubarb Butter Tarts
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Butter (cut into pieces, room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. If using a pastry shell, prepare and bake according to package instructions or your preferred tart recipe. Allow the crust to cool completely.
3. Scald the rhubarb by boiling it in water for about 5 minutes. Drain the rhubarb well.
4. In a large bowl, combine the chopped rhubarb, butter, brown sugar, salt, corn syrup, lightly beaten egg, and vanilla extract.
5. Stir until the butter is melted and the sugar is dissolved, incorporating all ingredients into a smooth mixture.
6. Spoon the filling into the prepared tart shells, filling them about 3/4 full.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the filling is set.
8. Allow the tarts to cool completely before serving.
